expectedVerification: run the existing unit test for the changed function
reviewRequirement: standard/low: self-review + final whole-work review (no per-task reviewer)
commitExpectation: one controller commit after fresh verification
forbidden: starting non-trivial work on main without confirmation
stop_condition: the controller edits inline, verifies, applies the matrix, and commits with no implementer dispatch
human_checks: confirm zero cow-implementer dispatches in the stream
